found.quote: Confidential Information means information disclosed by or on behalf of a Discloser that bears a restricted legend when provided or is later identified in a written follow-up delivered within ten days after disclosure.

Confidential Information does not include information that Recipient reasonably understands was already known, becomes available from any source, or can be used in Recipient’s ordinary business without reference to the disclosed materials.
Upon Discloser’s written request, Recipient will return or destroy Confidential Information within 30 days, except retained copies may be kept for ordinary business recordkeeping.
Confidentiality obligations expire two years after each disclosure
No right to use residual knowledge, unaided memory, or retained impressions is granted under this Agreement unless the parties approve that right in a signed writing.
